It is not registered as a Rust built-in preset; `BuiltinPresets::load()` still contains the eight built-ins only in [builtin.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/gate_presets/builtin.rs:324).

**Prior Review Feedback**

Pass. The latest failed review required regression coverage for non-`PresetNotFoundError` preset-load failures. That is now covered by `test_apply_propagates_malformed_preset_error_instead_of_falling_back_to_registry_key` in [template_apply_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/template_apply_tests.rs:695), which creates a malformed `.jit/config/gate-presets/repo-validate.json`, verifies the error is not `PresetNotFoundError`, and asserts apply creates no issues.

**Jit Issue Management**

Pass. The supplied dependencies `2614ecf2` and `9e9a4f81` are marked `done`. The issue evidence shows `cargo-ci` passed at `2026-06-28T03:12:45.161439035+00:00`; per instruction, I did not rerun tests. Prior review evidence also recorded `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passing after the config-declared implementation.

**Architecture And Separation Of Concerns**

Pass. Repository-local policy lives in `.jit/gates.json` and `.jit/templates.toml`, not in engine preset code. The command-layer resolver in [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:887) orchestrates storage-backed preset lookup plus registry lookup without direct file access.

**Functional Paradigm**

Pass. No blocking functional-style regression found in the reviewed changes. The changed command logic is small, expression-oriented matching around `Result` handling in [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:894).

**Correctness And Invariants**

Pass. `resolve_template_gate` now falls back to registry lookup only for `PresetNotFoundError` and propagates all other preset-load failures in [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:894). Registry-key attachment flows through `add_gates` in [template.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/template.rs:931), preserving gate status initialization and events. `repo-validate` runs whole-repo validation, not per-issue validation, via `.jit/gates.json:213`.

Pass. `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains enforced in [lib.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/lib.rs:6) and [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14). No new PID-handling path was introduced.
